preconditions: Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting the workflow.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can open the Login page from the Home page using the person/profile button
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state without authenticated user identity information.
Click the person/profile button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page and the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and interactable.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls remain visible and interactive after opening from the Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Inspect the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button.
Click into the Username and Password fields to confirm they accept input.
testCases.expectedResult: All Login page controls are visible, enabled, and interactive after the Login page opens from the Home page.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked while entering credentials on the Login page
steps: Navigate from the Home page guest state to the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Type Carwash#1 into the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters during input while the Username field remains readable.

testCases.title: Verify successful login returns the user to the authenticated Home page state
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user and returns to the Home page in authenticated state with authenticated user identity display and authenticated-only feature area visible.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated Home page state persists immediately after successful login transition
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page guest state.
Log in using Username krisadmin and Password Carwash#1.
Observe the Home page after the authentication redirect completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page reloads in authenticated state and visibly displays authenticated user identity information together with authenticated-only functionality.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and password combination displays the generic Failed message and keeps the user unauthenticated
steps: Navigate from the Home page guest state to the Login page.
Enter invaliduser into the Username field.
Enter InvalidPass#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the Login page remains visible or the application remains unauthenticated, and no authenticated Home state is shown.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page guest state.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page or in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with Username only populated fails with the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with Password only populated fails with the generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page guest state.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing whitespace handling for Username and Password values
steps: Navigate to the Login page through the Home page person/profile button.
Enter two leading and trailing spaces around krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter two leading and trailing spaces around Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles leading and trailing whitespace according to implemented business behavior and the resulting authentication state, redirect behavior, and any Failed message are consistently observable and stable.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only values in Username and Password fields fail authentication with the generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter only space characters into the Username field.
Enter only space characters into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify the Back button returns the user to the Home page without authenticating
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page guest state.
Click the Back button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state without displaying authenticated user identity information or authenticated-only features.

testCases.title: Verify the Home button returns the user to the Home page without authenticating
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page guest state.
Click the Home button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state and the user remains unauthenticated with authenticated-only UI hidden.

testCases.title: Verify very long Username and Password values are handled without breaking the Login page
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter a very long alphanumeric value into the Username field.
Enter a very long mixed-character value into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page remains stable, authentication does not succeed with invalid long credentials, and the generic Failed message is displayed while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Login page navigation sequence preserves Home-to-Login-to-Home SPA behavior
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home and verify guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Log in using Username krisadmin and Password Carwash#1.
Observe the destination page after authentication.
testCases.expectedResult: The workflow follows the approved SPA navigation sequence from Home page guest state to Login page and back to the Home page in authenticated state without requiring direct Login page URL access.
